prompt: I have an execution plan for a database migration CLI tool at augment-plan-workspace/test-plans/cli-tool-plan.md. Please augment it with CLI design requirements and project scaffolding. Save the augmented plan.

assertions.text: Plan contains a scaffolding milestone that creates README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and AGENTS.md
Plan specifies a structured JSON envelope for all CLI command responses
Plan defines an error code taxonomy with ERR_ prefixed codes
Plan specifies distinct exit code ranges per error category (not just 0/1)
Plan includes a guide subcommand that returns CLI schema as JSON
Plan adds --dry-run support to mutating commands (apply, rollback)
Plan includes change records with before/after state for mutations
Plan includes fingerprint-based conflict detection for the plan/apply pattern
Plan mentions LLM=true environment variable support
Progress section has been updated with new unchecked steps for the added milestones
